theScene: You carefully step through the dark passageways to return to the fourth chamber, proceeding forward until you enter the crossroad chamber lit by soundless purple flames held by regal, golden braziers.

Once within the spacious, flame-illuminated room, you step towards its center, stopping as you hear a chorus of low, ominous hisses pierce the eerie silence, accompanied by the light jingle of adornments bouncing and swaying as the large serpentine form of Iabel slithers out of a shadow-wreathed hallway.

Her masked eyes glare coldly and wordlessly down at you while her large, intimidating form moves forward in a captivating swaying motion as she settles into the room, her sizable ophidian body taking up a fair portion of the dimly-lit chamber.

Iabel’s living shadowy hair flits about around her of its own accord, their mass only adding to the difference in size between you, her daunting appearance offset slightly by the allure of her barely clothed, erotic body, its sensual appeal further accentuated by her languorous snakelike movements as she sets her wide hips to one side.
Come to bathe in my opulent grandeur? Or are you perhaps fool enough to challenge my lair?
Hmph, I suppose I can grace you with some conversation. You might even entertain me...
Hmph, you would dare so flippantly inquire about my sisters behind their backs? Having made it this far, you should already know them well enough, and I am not one for gossip.
Iabel leans back on her tail and crosses her arms under her plush bust, making her golden adornments jingle musically while her hair of snakes let out low idle hisses.
If you wish to learn more about them, you should talk to them yourself, foolish human...
She raises her long nailed fingers up to her lips with a proud laugh, and you can practically feel her gaze piercing down into you through her gilded mask.
Oho? The Umbral Labyrinth has caught your interest, mortal? Hmhmfm, my sister, Ushris is this twisting, unknowable place's master.

The very darkened halls of this place speak to those who listen, and when my gaze is obstructed, that true sight lets {i}me{/i} understand the Umbral Labyrinth in a completely different way from my sister.
Hufufu- You could not even {i}begin{/i} to comprehend this place's true powers. Its shadowy depths would consume your very being if you even tried to understand it, you foolish human.
She puffs out her heavy chest with pride, causing her gilded ornaments to jingle temptingly, while her coiling snakes hiss on occasion as they look about the room.
...You don't actually know anything about how this place works, do you?
{i}Guh-{/i} S-Silence! I know more than you could possibly imagine! Y-You are merely unworthy of being granted insight into the many things I know.
She punctuates her words with a pouty huff, bashfully squirming in place, her alluring curves winding back and forth for an eye-catching moment.
Now, let us talk of {i}other{/i} things of more importance, yes? Perhaps {i}me{/i} for example?
Oho-? Fufu, so you {i}do{/i} wish to know about me. How expected, yet pleasant.♪

She speaks with warm, imperious confidence, ending with a low purring hiss. One of her large shadowy snakes extends from her luxurious hair and slowly winds its way through the air towards you, its swaying course stopping a few inches from your face, the tenebrous creature clearly inspecting you as it flicks out its blue tongue, as if to gauge your intentions while it glares at you with a yellow tattoo-like eye.
Mfhfh-♪ Do not be afraid, human, you merely caught their interest with your request. They are a part of me, yet have a mind of their own, ready to rend apart those who would do me ill.
Were it not for the enchantment covering these lands, just being near me would be akin to courting death itself.
Not that it would keep you foolish humans from standing in awe before my beauty.♪

The pitch-black snake made of interwoven hair slinks away from you, going back to minding its own business with the others, while Iabel lightly sways with a languid coo, clearly enjoying your eyes feasting on her perfectly smooth skin, the subtle shakes of her wide hips and plush tits showing off the masked woman's fatal allure.
Honestly, with my power, grandeur, and sheer magnificence, I might as well rule as a queen over you mortals... or perhaps even as a goddess.♪ Ufufu.♪
Her confident smile and tone slips a bit as she continues.
I {i}mean{/i}... If I had the {i}land{/i}... and the subjects... Not to mention the logistical nightmare it would likely be... And becoming Demon Queen is just {i}far{/i} too much...
She lets out a heavy, pouty sigh, using one hand to fiddle with her silky black hair, while some of her shadowy snakes hiss with what sounds like amusement.
The serpentine shadows quiet down as ordered, and Iabel shifts her hips to the side with a thoughtful hum, unconsciously trailing her fingers along the soft skin of her hourglass curves.
...Really, there is not {i}that{/i} much I wish to divulge about myself... I suppose I enjoy reading? And suntanning... And fine foods.
Her snake-laden hair perks up and all hiss in agreement at the mention of 'food', making her sputter indignantly.
Wh- No we are not eating {i}now{/i}, you fools! And I told you: {i}hush!{/i}
Most of the coiling shadowy creatures go silent, but a few lowly hiss in response to her words.
Yes, I suppose I {i}could{/i} 'eat' [ThePlayerName]... But only should he decide to enter the labyrinth proper.

As she continues to talk to 'herself', the myriad of snakes all look to you with obvious hunger, flicking out their tongues on occasion, clearly trying to wordlessly convey that you should throw yourself at Iabel, before going back to writhing in the air innocently.
Hmph... Now then, is there anything else, human?
This mask that adorns my visage?
She casually points to her gold and black eye mask with a long nail, then hums pridefully, letting her hand trail down her bare, supple skin.

I wear it so my imperious gaze does not strike those around me with malevolent afflictions. While I {i}can{/i} control my stare, it is far better to be safe than to accidentally leave some unfortunate soul petrified.
You should be grateful I do not bare my eyes so freely. Lest you end up my captivated servant, hapless and immobile... Or a pleasant stone ornament.
She purrs low, swaying her hips in place while lightly trailing a single finger over the mask, emphasizing its importance.
Of course, in the labyrinth, you shall be my {i}prey{/i}... So if you are not wary, who knows how I will decide to toy with you once the mask comes off?♥

Iabel indignantly sneers at you from behind her gilded mask, her shadowy snakes collectively turning their full attention to you with low hisses, the sense of being cornered like a mouse creeping into the back of your mind.
{i}Yes{/i}. Of course I am a hellhound. And to assuage your foolish doubts-

Two of the shadowy snakes making up her hair deftly slither into place behind her head, mimicking two doglike ears, while the rest seem to calm down and avert their attention away from you. Iabel takes a regal pose and proudly smiles at you, her finely manicured hand daintily held close to her golden lips.
I am sure you are already shaking in your boots in terror at my amplified presence, poor adventurer. So I shall let you off easy.

Iabel slithers in place for a moment as she shifts her weight to the other side, giving her wide hips a small, subtle, jingly shake while her two 'ears' slide back to rejoin with the rest of her twisting snake hair, one hand trailing over her thin waist and the other over her collarbone as she idly hums in thought.

Hm, but as a token of indulgent mercy toward your rather impudent inquisitiveness, I shall inform you that my extraordinarily, alluring appearance is due to my birth drawing more from the regal and {i}opulent{/i} ophidian side of our demon beast lineage.

She says this calmly and smoothly, the grandiloquent demeanor she holds fading a little as she offers her explanation, her long serpentine body coiling in place, giving you an unintentional eyeful of her slowly swaying curves.
Now, with your curiosity sated, is there anything else you need to bother me with? Well, human?
She dismissively gestures to the air with one of her hands, clearly trying to coax you into further conversation despite her uninterested tone.
You make your way out of the labyrinth's twisting shadowy interior and return to the checkpoint gem, using it to teleport back to town.
Hmm? You're not afraid to face your doom then?
Then so be it, let us begin the challenge! Fufu, at least entertain me, human.

She winds around and confidently slithers down towards one of the darkened halls. Warned by the loud hissing of her hair, she narrowly avoids bumping into one of the stone walls, but despite the near-mishap, her movements show no slip in her confidence, her barely clothed ass in full view as it captivatingly sways back and forth.

Her leering snake hair gives you one last ominous hiss before she vanishes from sight with a twist of shadows, leaving you to trek down your own hall of choice, until just like the previous times it distorts and displaces you to an all new location...

Now unfathomably deep into the Labyrinth, you find yourself in pitch-black darkness, barely able to see ahead or behind you, leaving your surroundings dizzyingly uncertain, a gripping feeling of trepidation running across your scalp and down your spine at the idea of what might be expecting you.
Before you can take a step forward, however, the braziers lining the hallway suddenly and spectacularly flare to life, casting a contrasting, nigh-blinding purple light!

The sudden illumination reveals Iabel right across from you, flickering flame-conjured shadows dancing across her serpentine body like intangible caresses, the tantalizing light play subtly highlighting her curvaceous body, making her look mesmerizingly formidable and seductive at the same time...

Rising to her full serpentine height to complete her spectacular entrance, Iabel grins smugly at you while her hair dances and slithers around her, letting out a low predatory hiss as the hellhound opens her mouth to announce dramatically:
You stand before a large metal gate with multiple large locks...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.
Interact to open the treasure chest!
You stand before a large metal gate with multiple large locks...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.
You stand before a large metal gate with multiple large locks...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.
You stand before a large metal gate with multiple large locks...
The ground is laden in aphrodisiac.
You try to open the door, but it won't budge. It's still locked, you need more keys!

You use all of the keys you've collected and unlock the gate! It slowly starts to rise and open with intimidating metallic clacks and creaks, leaving you indecisively standing in place as you wait for it to open enough to let you through... until it suddenly stalls up with a grinding screech!

As you wonder what to do about this unexpected predicament, Iabel slithers up behind you with a low purring hiss of gloating delight, the still struggling door keeping you trapped between freedom and your curvy pursuer.
Fufu~♥ You did not think it would be {i}that{/i} easy, did you?♥

Escaping into the near pitch-black hall, you slow down your pace slightly so as not to slip down the curved sloping passage. For once, only silence welcomes your completion of the challenge. Even your footsteps don't seem to ring as loudly as before as you step upon the blackened stones, and Iabel doesn't appear to escort you like her sisters in the trials prior. Even Ceris doesn't burst in...

After a long walk through the silent inky darkness, you come to a large set of black iron doors, unlike anything you've seen so far within the labyrinth. You brace yourself and push them open, expecting the worse-

And you are hit with the stark brightness of a very well lit chamber, the light blinding you for a few moments. Blinking owlishly, you are hit with a sudden shower of confetti tossed on you by the four sisters, most of it lobbed your way by Ushris' massive claws. You're even given a small round of applause.
Iabel's smooth delivery is cut off by Ceris' much more exuberant one, her huge fluffy tail swaying excitedly.

The applause and confetti cascade continue for a few moments longer then gradually quiet down. In the back, Ceris tightly headlocks Beris with a boisterous laugh, her blue-tinged sister snarling and swearing at her, while Ushris comes forward and gives you a small curtsy.
Well done,♪ well done!♪ What a pleasant surprise this is... Now, Iabel my dear sister, if you would you be so kind as to give [ThePlayerName] his well-earned reward.

Ushris' adorning chains rattle as she smoothly moves aside and turns to her much larger serpentine sister who sighs, her many snakes hissing lazily as she slithers closer to you, the shapely sway of her wide hips and plush breasts as eye-catching as ever while her plush golden lips are set in a slight pout.

She holds out a shiny purple and black card to you in her well-manicured fingers, ceremoniously proffering it to you from a slight distance. After a moment of trepidant hesitation, you take the card and look it over, seeing a small picture of yourself on it.
This is all the documentation you will require to henceforth freely pass through the labyrinth and enter the capital city.
Do not let this gracious reward for your efforts go to waste.
She coils her way to the side of the chamber with a haughty chuckle, but you can't help but wonder about something....
How did you get my picture on here?
Oh,♪ do not worry about that, hihihi.♪

You glare at Ushris for her non-response, but she's busy huffing as she looks over to her other two sisters, grabbing them with her large claws to drag them stumbling off to the side, Ceris laughing cheerfully while Beris continues to struggle and swear until her elder finally relents and breaks the embrace.
Now the path is clear and you may proceed onwards. There is a checkpoint gem there for your convenience.
Great job! Be sure to stop by again soon.♥
You nod and step forward, past the four sisters who give you small waves and goodbyes as you press on into the next room.

As the door shuts behind you, you're left once more in total silence, aside from the hum of the large floating checkpoint gem within. Upon touching it for attunement, you realize that your passport must already be attuned to it, as you're not given a small gem to slot into your grimoire this time, leaving you wondering what to do next...
Continue on out towards the capital.

EventText.NameOfScene: Continue on out towards the capital.
theScene: You decide to press onwards and step forward, pushing open the large stone doors, flinching slightly at the change in lighting as a crack appears between them, giving you momentary blinding as you leave the shadowy tunnels of the Umbral Labyrinth behind...
Shrugging, you move on, deciding to head back to town for now before venturing on to the monster capital...

Escaping into the near pitch-black hall, you slow down your pace slightly so as not to slip down the curved sloping passage, walking for quite some time in empty silence. Even your footsteps don't seem to ring as loudly as before as you step upon the blackened stones...

Until you finally emerge back into Iabel's purple flame-illuminated chamber, the large serpentine woman lounging in the center of the gilded room, sighing as you draw closer and your footsteps once more click on the stones. When she gently lifts up a hand to remove her mask, an instinctive part of your mind momentarily panics under her imperious but currently harmless gaze.

Until you finally emerge back into Iabel's purple flame-illuminated chamber, the large serpentine woman lounging in the center of the gilded room, sighing as you draw closer and your footsteps once more click on the stones. Then, to your surprise, she gently lifts up a hand to remove her mask, making you freeze up in alarm.
Oh, don't look so worried. I can control the power of my gaze if I focus.
You have certainly proven that, at the very least, you deserve properly given praise, and I was not able to do so prior... And it felt improper to do so later... So, again: well done.
Her shadowy snakes twist in the air of their own accord as she lightly sways in place, her gilded adornments jingling against her gently bouncing curves.
Just... Don't let it go to your head.♪
She lets out a low, haughty chuckle, and delicately puts her mask back on, your body slackening slightly, making you realize you were instinctively tense under her daunting gaze.
Now, do you have any other business with me, human?
She inquires with pointed disinterest, though she can't hide a hint of curiosity.
